feedback.text: I would love for games to also get protection since they are such a big part of everyone's life regardless if you play or not but even more if you actually play games you should expect protection for the product/service you buy and spent time with. There should be a lot of things regulated in games like gambling/dark patterns/end of life plines like stop killing games is working towards. Actually release a working product and not a MVP(Minimum Viable Product) Influencers should have clear and obvious disclaimers when promoting a game thanks to a sponsorship Addictive design shouldnt be allowed and have all chances/rng actual numbers if the game has lootboxes/gambling and anything along those lines. Thank you and I hope you guys take games seriously and protect this wonderful hobby that people take advantage off and ruin it.
